rationale.R1.2: Identified a load-bearing internal contradiction about retrieval and proposed a solution that resolves it honestly.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Self-Refine) and articulates the delta with other works in the climate-NLP literature.
rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
